domains.name: Repo and post-build audit evidence integrity
domains.purpose: Validate repo clean/synced state and consume the post-build audit seal.

domains.name: Build surface and artifact completeness
domains.purpose: Validate the 75-file build surface, manifests, seal and summaries.

domains.name: Prompt governance contract correctness
domains.purpose: Validate all prompt governance contracts remain deterministic and fail-closed.

domains.name: Security and production-blocking matrix
domains.purpose: Validate prompt production, final prompt generation, full prompt body, script/content generation and automation remain blocked.

domains.name: Negative and failure injection validation
domains.purpose: Validate at least 54 negative signals and 25 failure injection signals.

domains.name: Runtime and test baseline
domains.purpose: Validate targeted pytest >=120, content_engine pytest >=261 and runtime domain checks.

domains.name: Protected roots and no-touch policy
domains.purpose: Validate no mutation to manual, brain, reports-brain, queue, metrics, assets, publishing, n8n, webhooks or CAPA9 roots.

domains.name: Validation sequence discipline
domains.purpose: Allow only VALIDATION_PLAN next; keep validation execution and gate closure blocked.

domains.name: Canonical evidence and traceability
domains.purpose: Validate canonical JSON, manifest completeness, seal hash and artifact traceability.

domains.name: Idempotency and recovery behavior
domains.purpose: Validate re-run states remain blocked and failures stay FAILED_BLOCKED without commit/push.

git_context.subject: Post-build audit Content Engine prompt governance core
